themes.exampleQuote: The strawberry matcha here might be the best I've ever had.
there were a lot of good options for drinks! both drinks my sister and I tried were delicious.
I just wish this place was bigger, gets packed quickly!
mine was definitely on the sweet side
I asked for a blueberry muffin, received a raisin/walnut muffin, let them know, I had to pay for a new muffin.
the workers are so nice every time I visit!

notable_quote: The strawberry matcha here might be the best I've ever had. The coffee, food, and overall cafe vibe is fantastic.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers return for the specialty drinks, particularly the strawberry matcha and tiramisu latte, and consistently praise the staff; the friction points are capacity and at least one service recovery that cost a customer money instead of goodwill.
quarter_narrative: Seven Pittsburgh creators filed TikToks at Delanie's Coffee Shadyside this quarter, logging 6,787 plays across the board while the shop itself posted three times on Instagram and never once to TikTok. The cookie butter latte is doing its own PR, with @madisonrockk's 2,190-play video carrying a dedicated hashtag the business didn't seed and can't point back to anything on its own channels. In the Pittsburgh Cafes family, Allegheny Coffee and Tea Exchange holds the top position on social momentum; Delanie's sits seventh in that family, carried almost entirely by creator goodwill and a conversion path that is flawless on paper. The rank moves when the gap between seven creators filming and zero TikTok presence from the shop itself starts to close.
tldr_read: Creator coverage is strong and the conversion path is complete, but a dormant TikTok and below-median review sentiment keep Delanie's at Ones to Watch, #7 in Pittsburgh Cafes.
tldr_meaning: The creator layer is already active and the Google profile converts; review volume and social posting frequency are the two variables that determine whether this stays a hidden gem or becomes a recurring name in the family.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Seventh In Pittsburgh Cafes, Carried By Creators. The Shop Itself Has No TikTok To Show For It.

playbook.headline: Claim the TikTok account now
playbook.action: Seven creators have already tagged this business; a TikTok profile lets Delanie's stitch, repost, and meet that audience where it already lives.

playbook.headline: Fix the order error recovery policy
playbook.action: One documented case of charging a customer for a staff mistake is pulling the sentiment signal below the family median of 79; a no-charge remake policy closes that gap directly.

playbook.headline: Expand the photo catalog past six categories
playbook.action: Delanie's sits at 68 against a family visual median of 77; adding staff, behind-the-counter, and seasonal drink photos closes that gap and gives creators more surface to tag.
